title: Prostate cancer biology & genomics.
author: Whitaker H Tam JO Connor MJ Grey A
content: S-EPMC7354295 PMC7354295 Prostate cancer biology & genomics. Prostate Cancer is now the second biggest cause of cancer mortality in the UK. Media coverage has been rising, with some attributing to a rise in the cases diagnosed and treated in the NHS down to the "Fry and Turnbull effect". Our
